markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss implementation process and contract details for GrowthX's content marketing services with HockeyStack.](https://fathom.video/share/51rHwkMiRrkAU_chiyH45LAM8HuoVsom?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX's strategy sprint now includes content creation, aiming for daily publishing (new + refreshed content)](https://fathom.video/share/51rHwkMiRrkAU_chiyH45LAM8HuoVsom?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Flexible approach to additional projects/workstreams, scoped during strategy sprint](https://fathom.video/share/51rHwkMiRrkAU_chiyH45LAM8HuoVsom?tab=summary&timestamp=585.0)
  - [Competitive research involves gap analysis, deep dives, and strategic content insertion for LLM visibility](https://fathom.video/share/51rHwkMiRrkAU_chiyH45LAM8HuoVsom?tab=summary&timestamp=761.0)
  - [Design involvement varies; GrowthX offers best practices and can implement if needed](https://fathom.video/share/51rHwkMiRrkAU_chiyH45LAM8HuoVsom?tab=summary&timestamp=988.0)

## Topics

### Implementation Process Overview

  - [Week 1: Kickoff meeting with deep discovery questions](https://fathom.video/share/51rHwkMiRrkAU_chiyH45LAM8HuoVsom?tab=summary&timestamp=210.0)
  - [Weeks 1-2: Generate key artifacts, develop content strategy, start calibration](https://fathom.video/share/51rHwkMiRrkAU_chiyH45LAM8HuoVsom?tab=summary&timestamp=234.0)
  - [By Week 8: \~32 pieces of content published across defined topic clusters](https://fathom.video/share/51rHwkMiRrkAU_chiyH45LAM8HuoVsom?tab=summary&timestamp=395.0)
  - [Transparent workflow in Ocean platform, showing all interactions and progress](https://fathom.video/share/51rHwkMiRrkAU_chiyH45LAM8HuoVsom?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
  - [Time commitment from client: \~30 min/week + 30 min async checks](https://fathom.video/share/51rHwkMiRrkAU_chiyH45LAM8HuoVsom?tab=summary&timestamp=560.0)

### Content Strategy and Output

  - [Aim for daily publishing, including new and refreshed content](https://fathom.video/share/51rHwkMiRrkAU_chiyH45LAM8HuoVsom?tab=summary&timestamp=585.0)
  - [Topic clusters mapped to personas/audiences](https://fathom.video/share/51rHwkMiRrkAU_chiyH45LAM8HuoVsom?tab=summary&timestamp=314.0)
  - [Flexibility for additional workstreams (e.g., Airbyte's refresh lane for 5000 pages)](https://fathom.video/share/51rHwkMiRrkAU_chiyH45LAM8HuoVsom?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [No strict content limit, but large projects may require trade-offs](https://fathom.video/share/51rHwkMiRrkAU_chiyH45LAM8HuoVsom?tab=summary&timestamp=585.0)

### Competitive Research Approach

  - [Identify competitive gaps through audience mapping and query monitoring](https://fathom.video/share/51rHwkMiRrkAU_chiyH45LAM8HuoVsom?tab=summary&timestamp=779.0)
  - [Analyze competitors' evergreen content and keyword rankings](https://fathom.video/share/51rHwkMiRrkAU_chiyH45LAM8HuoVsom?tab=summary&timestamp=812.0)
  - [Create comparison content with deep research on each topic](https://fathom.video/share/51rHwkMiRrkAU_chiyH45LAM8HuoVsom?tab=summary&timestamp=868.0)
  - [Strategic insertion of client's solution in content for quick LLM pickup](https://fathom.video/share/51rHwkMiRrkAU_chiyH45LAM8HuoVsom?tab=summary&timestamp=902.0)

### Design and Implementation

  - [Varies based on client needs and existing resources](https://fathom.video/share/51rHwkMiRrkAU_chiyH45LAM8HuoVsom?tab=summary&timestamp=988.0)
  - [Can provide best practices, full design, or work with existing design team](https://fathom.video/share/51rHwkMiRrkAU_chiyH45LAM8HuoVsom?tab=summary&timestamp=1036.0)
  - [Examples: full design for VAPI, best practice recommendations for Interwell](https://fathom.video/share/51rHwkMiRrkAU_chiyH45LAM8HuoVsom?tab=summary&timestamp=1030.0)
  - [Key elements: CTAs, Table of Contents, related content, author info, last updated](https://fathom.video/share/51rHwkMiRrkAU_chiyH45LAM8HuoVsom?tab=summary&timestamp=1065.0)

### Technical Setup

  - [Webflow access needed; Enterprise version not required but helpful for multi-user editing](https://fathom.video/share/51rHwkMiRrkAU_chiyH45LAM8HuoVsom?tab=summary&timestamp=1129.0)
  - [Automated publishing available (as drafts, with human QA)](https://fathom.video/share/51rHwkMiRrkAU_chiyH45LAM8HuoVsom?tab=summary&timestamp=1101.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Emir to forward SOW to HockeyStack's head of finance for review](https://fathom.video/share/51rHwkMiRrkAU_chiyH45LAM8HuoVsom?tab=summary&timestamp=1241.0)
  - [Tyler to follow up on kickoff date preferences (tentatively penciled for August 18th)](https://fathom.video/share/51rHwkMiRrkAU_chiyH45LAM8HuoVsom?tab=summary&timestamp=1250.0)
  - [HockeyStack to confirm timeline after internal discussions](https://fathom.video/share/51rHwkMiRrkAU_chiyH45LAM8HuoVsom?tab=summary&timestamp=1289.0)
  - [GrowthX to prepare for kickoff meeting and initial discovery process](https://fathom.video/share/51rHwkMiRrkAU_chiyH45LAM8HuoVsom?tab=summary&timestamp=1294.0)
